'''Vell Narot''' was a blonde news anchor who worked for [[CSN]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], she reported on a story of [[Gael Kinner|somebody]] sneaking into the [[Bollin Exotic Animal Emporium]] after hours and falling into the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] enclosure.
